description_long: This is a robust men's wristwatch with a square, metallic case and a matching metal link bracelet. The watch face is black with silver hour markers and hands, featuring a day-date window on the right side. The brand name 'DIESEL' is prominently displayed on the dial, and the watch has a crown on the right for adjusting time and date. The bracelet is composed of large, rectangular links, giving it a bold, industrial look. The overall finish is matte with some subtle gloss on the case edges, and the watch appears solid and substantial, suitable for everyday urban wear.
description: A square, black-faced DIESEL wristwatch with a metal link bracelet and day-date display, featuring a bold, industrial design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the black dial, silver markers, hands, and the DIESEL logo with a visible day-date window.
description_view_1: Side/top view highlighting the thickness of the case, the crown, and the open, curved metal bracelet.
description_view_2: Rear view focusing on the solid metal link bracelet and the back of the watch case.
description_view_3: Angled rear/side view showing the inside of the bracelet and a partial glimpse of the watch face.
attribute_brand_logo: The DIESEL brand logo is printed in uppercase letters on the upper left quadrant of the dial.
attribute_dial_design: The dial is black with silver stick indices for hour markers, silver hour and minute hands, and a day-date window at the 3 o'clock position. The design is bold and functional, with a minimalist, industrial style and no subdials or decorative patterns.
attribute_strap_type: Metal link bracelet made of stainless steel, featuring large, rectangular links for a rugged appearance.
attribute_watch_face_display: Analog display with three hands (hour, minute, second) and a day-date complication at 3 o'clock. No luminous elements are visible.
